description: Provide semantic Table and justified interactive Grid modes, client/server data operations, column and row manipulation, editing, virtualization, focus recovery, saved views, safe export, and narrow-screen alternatives.

files.content:
export {
  DataGrid,
  type DataGridColumn,
  type DataGridColumnAlignment,
  type DataGridColumnSizeOptions,
  type DataGridColumnSizingChangeDetail,
  type DataGridColumnSizingOptions,
  type DataGridColumnWidths,
  type DataGridDetailRowsChangeDetail,
  type DataGridDetailRowsOptions,
  type DataGridExpandedRowIds,
  type DataGridColumnVisibility,
  type DataGridColumnVisibilityAdapter,
  type DataGridColumnVisibilityChangeDetail,
  type DataGridColumnVisibilityOptions,
  type DataGridCursorPaginationOptions,
  type DataGridCursorPaginationState,
  type DataGridFilteringOptions,
  type DataGridMessages,
  type DataGridOperationMode,
  type DataGridOperationReason,
  type DataGridOperationStatus,
  type DataGridPagePaginationOptions,
  type DataGridPagePaginationState,
  type DataGridPaginationOptions,
  type DataGridPaginationState,
  type DataGridProps,
  type DataGridQuery,
  type DataGridQueryAdapter,
  type DataGridQueryChangeDetail,
  type DataGridQuerySummaryContext,
  type DataGridSelectionChangeDetail,
  type DataGridSelectionMode,
  type DataGridSelectionProps,
  type DataGridSortDirection,
  type DataGridSorting,
  type DataGridSortingChangeDetail,
  type DataGridSortingProps,
  normalizeDataGridQuery,
  parseDataGridColumnVisibility,
  parseDataGridQuery,
  serializeDataGridColumnVisibility,
  serializeDataGridQuery,
} from "./data-grid";

export {
  createDataGridCsv,
  type DataGridCsvColumn,
  type DataGridCsvDelimiter,
  type DataGridCsvFormulaProtection,
  type DataGridCsvNewline,
  type DataGridCsvOptions,
  type DataGridCsvValue,
} from "./data-grid-csv";

title: Data Grid
